name: GOLFTEC Jacksonville
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf training facility specializing in personalized instruction, club fitting, and high-tech practice. Utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, they provide detailed feedback on swing mechanics and performance. Their approach is tailored to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, offering a structured path to improvement through expert coaching and personalized game plans. The Jacksonville location, however, appears to be unavailable, as the specific page yields a 'Page Not Found' error.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and motion capture technology
Personalized game plans and coaching from certified PGA professionals
All-in-one facility offering lessons, practice, and club fitting

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site bar or alcohol service mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for club fitting and data analysis.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs, or clubs can be provided for lessons and fittings. GOLFTEC also offers a variety of club brands for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site dining, so bringing food and drink is likely permitted, but it's best to confirm directly with the location.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator play time can vary, but a full 18-hole round typically takes around 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the course and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for young golfers, with coaching and technology designed to help them improve.
